statement: In every magma, Equation 1011 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (w * z))`) implies Equation 2472 (`x = (x * ((y * y) * z)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0869
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op w z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op (op y y) z)) x)
